name: @nshiab/setup-data-project
description: Quickly kick off your data project using the simple-data-analysis and journalism libraries.

tasks.all-tests: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check src/main.ts && deno publish --allow-dirty --dry-run && deno test -A --fail-fast -- --internal-test-mode
tasks.patch: deno task all-tests && deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/bump-version patch
tasks.minor: deno task all-tests && deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/bump-version minor
tasks.major: deno task all-tests && deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/bump-version major
